title: 目標達成の後に・アタシの戦場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spring is here once more. One day, just when I'm
about to call an end to Bamboo Memory's
training arc...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thanks for another FIERY training session!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for us to decide the
path Bamboo Memory will take.
choice_data_list: Let's talk about your future races.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've gleaned a lot from the training she's done up
till now. After agonizing over the information, I'm
left with only one conclusion.
choice_data_list: I think you should do sprints and miles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sprints and miles. As her trainer, I've determined
that Bamboo Memory will be at her best running
those two distances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But in the end, that's just what I've decided. None
of it means anything if my suggestion doesn't
align with what Bamboo Memory wants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's determined to run in medium and long
distances like her friends and take on the Classic
Triple Crown tour, then—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see how well I'll do in sprints and
miles!
choice_data_list: Wait, you're really okay with this?
Wait, you're really okay with this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course I'm okay with it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you believe that's the best way for me to
reach the top and make my dream come true,
right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And I trust you! If you say that's what I should run,
then that's what I want to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words and eyes both convey her trust in me,
and the uncertainty I felt melts away. But a flicker
of doubt remains... does she know what this
means?
choice_data_list:
If you run sprints and miles, you can't race
Yaeno and the others.

If you run sprints and miles, you can't race
Yaeno and the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know I could just keep this to myself, but I want Bamboo Memory to make an informed decision—this is her future, after all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well... that's what happens when your aptitudes
differ. Of course I'd like to run with everyone,
but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I don't think now is the time for that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: No.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno, Chiyono O, Ardan—everyone has a dream
they're striving for!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And all those dreams are big, bright, and
beautiful! It's AWESOME!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, when I think of them becoming my
rivals alongside Oguri, I wanna scream with joy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Maybe that's why... I think the way I do.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I came here to meet life-changing rivals and take
them on in red-hot, passionate races! If I want to
make that a reality...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: If I want to make my dream come true, I have to become a super awesome, ultra strong racer worthy of Yaeno and the others!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I know your dream is to make me the strongest
Umamusume, and I believe in your dream more
than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm more than ready to take the skills you see in me and blaze down the path you've chosen!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna sprint all-out down that road because I
know it'll lead me right to my dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately, I want to live up to the trust she
places in me. That desire sets my heart alight,
banishing any remaining uncertainty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to communicate that to her. As her trainer,
it's my dream to lead her to her dream!
choice_data_list: Let's run in the Swan Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Swan Stakes is a 1,400-meter G2 turf race
held at Kyoto Racecourse at the end of October.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This graded sprint is known as the battleground
where racers gather to make a name for
themselves in miles and sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect race for Bamboo Memory to test
her distance aptitude!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to put everything I've learned to
the test! Yaaaaah! I feel like I'm on fire!
choice_data_list: Let's conquer both sprints and miles!
Let's conquer both sprints and miles!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
choice_data_list:
And let's make you the strongest in this
generation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I gonna do it! I'm gonna be the best racer in
sprints and miles! And after that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'll be able to stand alongside everyone in my
generation! I'll be right there with my friends and
their passionate dreams! That's how I'll reach my
red-hot rivals!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: BAMBOO MEMORYYY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal race is the Swan Stakes! The next
phase of Bamboo Memory's racing career, her
classic year, starts now!
